ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the simulation was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "total_runtime" REAL /* Total runtime of the simulation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_series_data" (
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time series data point */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time value for the data point */,
  "average" REAL /* Average value for the data point */,
  "coupling_its" REAL /* Coupling information for the data point */,
  "from_sub" REAL /* From sub-system value for the data point */,
  "to_sub" REAL /* To sub-system value for the data point */,
  "standard_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the data point */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the data point */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the data point */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data point */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_series_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_series_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_system_permission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is a system-level permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the visualization belongs to */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart used for the visualization */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used for the visualization */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_chart_type FOREIGN KEY ("chart_type") REFERENCES charts ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the chart */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the chart */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the chart type is a default type for new visualizations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "time_series_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time series data the version belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "versioned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_time_series_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_series_id") REFERENCES time_series_data ("time_series_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the event belongs to */,
  "event" TEXT /* Event description */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the event occurred */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the history event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., creation, update, deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_history_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the data belongs to */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the access occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_access_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "is_system_setting" INTEGER /* Indicates if the setting is a system-level setting */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the parameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the output belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the output */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the output */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the output */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_outputs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the input belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the input */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the input */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the input */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the input */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_inputs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
